languages.text: "Мы с дражайшим коллегой уже провели не один консилиум, но так и не пришли к консенсусу. Нунциус — скептик, наши позиции редко сходятся, но рано или поздно мы приходим к компромиссу. Но, увы, не в этот раз. Единственное, на чем мы сошлись, — необходимость третьего мнения. Лишь вы способны это мнение предоставить — это неоспоримый факт".

"My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: "Мы с дражайшим коллегой уже провели не один консилиум, но так и не пришли к консенсусу. Нунциус — скептик, наши позиции редко сходятся, но рано или поздно мы приходим к компромиссу. Но, увы, не в этот раз. Единственное, на чем мы сошлись, — необходимость третьего мнения. Лишь вы способны это мнение предоставить — это неоспоримый факт".

traits.locale_text: "My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact.

"My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact.

"My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact.

languages.text: 「私の最も親しい同僚と私は、何度も協議を重ねてきたが、結論には至らなかった。ヌンシウスは疑い深い人物で、私たちの意見はほとんど一致しない。しかし、最終的には妥協点を見つけることが多かった。しかし、今回は残念ながらそうはいかない。私たちが一致したのは、第三者の意見が必要であるということだけだ。その意見は、あなたしか提供できない。それは、確かな事実だ。」
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact.

traits.locale_text: 「私の最も親しい同僚と私は、何度も協議を重ねてきたが、結論には至らなかった。ヌンシウスは疑い深い人物で、私たちの意見はほとんど一致しない。しかし、最終的には妥協点を見つけることが多かった。しかし、今回は残念ながらそうはいかない。私たちが一致したのは、第三者の意見が必要であるということだけだ。その意見は、あなたしか提供できない。それは、確かな事実だ。」

languages.text: “我与我最亲爱的同僚曾多次探讨，却始终无法达成一致。努恩修斯是个怀疑论者，我们的立场鲜少相同，但最终总能达成妥协。可遗憾的是，这次却不行。我们达成的唯一共识，就是需要引入第三方意见。而只有您能提供这个意见——这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “我与我最亲爱的同僚曾多次探讨，却始终无法达成一致。努恩修斯是个怀疑论者，我们的立场鲜少相同，但最终总能达成妥协。可遗憾的是，这次却不行。我们达成的唯一共识，就是需要引入第三方意见。而只有您能提供这个意见——这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: «Mi buen colega y yo hemos tenido más de un consilium, pero nunca hemos alcanzado un consenso. Nuncius es escéptico y nuestras posiciones no suelen coincidir, pero al final siempre acabamos llegando a un compromiso. No obstante, esta ocasión es distinta. Lo único en lo que estamos de acuerdo es que necesitamos una tercera opinión. Solo usted puede proporcionárnosla: es un hecho indiscutible».
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «Mi buen colega y yo hemos tenido más de un consilium, pero nunca hemos alcanzado un consenso. Nuncius es escéptico y nuestras posiciones no suelen coincidir, pero al final siempre acabamos llegando a un compromiso. No obstante, esta ocasión es distinta. Lo único en lo que estamos de acuerdo es que necesitamos una tercera opinión. Solo usted puede proporcionárnosla: es un hecho indiscutible.

languages.text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege und ich hatten schon so manches Consilium, ohne jedoch einen Konsens zu erreichen. Nuncius ist ein Skeptiker und wir vertreten nur selten dieselbe Position, aber wir versuchen stets, einen Kompromiss zu erzielen. Nur leider nicht in diesem Fall. In diesem Fall sind wir uns nur einig, dass wir eine dritte Meinung brauchen. Und diese Meinung könnt nur Ihr beisteuern ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege und ich hatten schon so manches Consilium, ohne jedoch einen Konsens zu erreichen. Nuncius ist ein Skeptiker und wir vertreten nur selten dieselbe Position, aber wir versuchen stets, einen Kompromiss zu erzielen. Nur leider nicht in diesem Fall. In diesem Fall sind wir uns nur einig, dass wir eine dritte Meinung brauchen. Und diese Meinung könnt nur Ihr beisteuern ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: « Mon cher collègue et moi avons discuté de ce sujet à maintes reprises, sans jamais parvenir à nous mettre d'accord. Nuncius étant un grand sceptique, il est rare que nos opinions s'alignent, mais nous finissons tout de même par trouver un compromis la plupart du temps. Malheureusement, ce cas fait partie des exceptions. La seule chose sur laquelle nous nous accordons, c'est que nous avons besoin d'un troisième avis et il n'y a qu'au vôtre que nous pouvons nous fier. C'est là un fait incontestable. »
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: « Mon cher collègue et moi avons discuté de ce sujet à maintes reprises, sans jamais parvenir à nous mettre d'accord. Nuncius étant un grand sceptique, il est rare que nos opinions s'alignent, mais nous finissons tout de même par trouver un compromis la plupart du temps. Malheureusement, ce cas fait partie des exceptions. La seule chose sur laquelle nous nous accordons, c'est que nous avons besoin d'un troisième avis et il n'y a qu'au vôtre que nous pouvons nous fier. C'est là un fait incontestable. »

languages.text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım ve ben birden fazla kez konsil yapsak da hiçbir zaman bir fikir birliğine varamadık. Nuncius çok şüpheci ve durduğumuz yerler nadiren uyuşuyor. Buna rağmen en sonunda genellikle uzlaşmaya varıyoruz. Tabii korkarım bu sefer durum farklı. Üzerinde anlaştığımız tek şey, üçüncü bir görüşe ihtiyacımızın olduğu. Bize söz konusu görüşü sadece siz sunabilirsiniz. İşte bu tartışılmaz bir gerçek."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague and I have had more than one consilium, but we have never reached a consensus. Nuncius is a sceptic, and our positions rarely align, but we tend to reach a compromise in the end. But, alas, not on this occasion. The only thing we agree on is the need for a third opinion. Only you can furnish us with said opinion — this is an incontrovertible fact."
